LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mm_FMJ.label: 14.5x114mm (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mm_FMJ.description: Old-school anti-tank cartridge originally designed for AT rifles, it is also used by a number of heavy machine guns.
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mm_AP.label: 14.5x114mm (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mm_AP.description: Old-school anti-tank cartridge originally designed for AT rifles, it is also used by a number of heavy machine guns.
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mm_Incendiary.label: 14.5x114mm (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mm_Incendiary.description: Old-school anti-tank cartridge originally designed for AT rifles, it is also used by a number of heavy machine guns.
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mm_HE.label: 14.5x114mm (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mm_HE.description: Old-school anti-tank cartridge originally designed for AT rifles, it is also used by a number of heavy machine guns.
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mm_Sabot.label: 14.5x114mm (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mm_Sabot.description: Old-school anti-tank cartridge originally designed for AT rifles, it is also used by a number of heavy machine guns.
LanguageData.Bullet_145x114mm_FMJ.label: 14.5x114mm bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_145x114mm_AP.label: 14.5x114mm bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_145x114mm_Incendiary.label: 14.5x114mm bullet (AP-I)
LanguageData.Bullet_145x114mm_HE.label: 14.5x114mm bullet (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Bullet_145x114mm_Sabot.label: 14.5x114mm bullet (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mmUNSC_FMJ.label: 14.5x114mmUNSC cartridge (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mmUNSC_FMJ.description: Old-school anti-tank cartridge originally designed for AT rifles, it is now used by UNSC heavy sniper rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mmUNSC_Incendiary.label: 14.5x114mmUNSC cartridge (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mmUNSC_Incendiary.descriptio: Old-school anti-tank cartridge originally designed for AT rifles, it is now used by UNSC heavy sniper rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mmUNSC_HE.label: 14.5x114mmUNSC cartridge (HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mmUNSC_HE.description: Old-school anti-tank cartridge originally designed for AT rifles, it is now used by UNSC heavy sniper rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mmUNSC_Sabot.label: 14.5x114mmUNSC cartridge (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_145x114mmUNSC_Sabot.description: Old-school anti-tank cartridge originally designed for AT rifles, it is now used by UNSC heavy sniper rifles.
LanguageData.Bullet_145x114mmUNSC_FMJ.label: 14.5x114mmUNSC bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_145x114mmUNSC_Incendiary.label: 14.5x114mmUNSC bullet (AP-I)
LanguageData.Bullet_145x114mmUNSC_HE.label: 14.5x114mmUNSC bullet (HE)
LanguageData.Bullet_145x114mmUNSC_Sabot.label: 14.5x114mmUNSC bullet (Sabot)
